keyEvents.text: Goal! Tunisia 0, Japan 1. Daichi Kamada (Japan) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Keito Nakamura.
Goal! Tunisia 0, Japan 2. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ko Itakura following a fast break.
Substitution, Tunisia. Ismaël Gharbi replaces Elias Saad.
Substitution, Tunisia. Mohamed Amine Ben Hmida replaces Dylan Bronn.
Substitution, Tunisia. Firas Chaouat replaces Sebastian Tounekti.
Goal! Tunisia 0, Japan 3. Junya Ito (Japan) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ayase Ueda with a through ball.
Substitution, Japan. Junnosuke Suzuki replaces Daichi Kamada.
Substitution, Japan. Yukinari Sugawara replaces Ritsu Doan.
Substitution, Japan. Yuito Suzuki replaces Keito Nakamura.
Substitution, Japan. Ayumu Seko replaces Takehiro Tomiyasu.
Goal! Tunisia 0, Japan 4. Ayase Ueda (Japan) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kaishu Sano with a cross.
Substitution, Japan. Keisuke Goto replaces Ayase Ueda.
Substitution, Tunisia. Rani Khedira replaces Ellyes Skhiri.
Substitution, Tunisia. Elias Achouri replaces Ali Abdi.
Goal! Spain 1, Saudi Arabia 0. Lamine Yamal (Spain) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mikel Oyarzabal with a cross.

Goal! Spain 2, Saudi Arabia 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Aymeric Laporte with a headed pass following a corner.
Goal! Spain 3, Saudi Arabia 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Dani Olmo with a headed pass.
Salem Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Spain. Yéremy Pino replaces Lamine Yamal.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Mohamed Kanno replaces Abdullah Al Khaibari.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Abdullah Al Hamddan replaces Musab Al Juwayr.
Own Goal by Hassan Al Tambakti, Saudi Arabia. Spain 4, Saudi Arabia 0.
Mohamed Kanno (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Mohammed Abu Al Shamat replaces Feras Al Brikan.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Alaa Al Hejji replaces Abdulelah Al Amri.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.
Substitution, Spain. Nico Williams replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Spain. Fabián Ruiz replaces Pedri.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Khalid Al Ghannam replaces Nasser Al Dawsari.
Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Saeid Ezatolahi (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, IR Iran. Alireza Jahanbakhsh replaces Saleh Hardani.
Substitution, Belgium. Timothy Castagne replaces Thomas Meunier.
Substitution, Belgium. Hans Vanaken replaces Nicolas Raskin.
Substitution, Belgium. Dodi Lukébakio replaces Alexis Saelemaekers.
Substitution, IR Iran. Mehdi Torabi replaces Mohammad Mohebbi.
Substitution, IR Iran. Milad Mohammadi replaces Ehsan Hajisafi.
Nathan Ngoy (Belgium) is shown the red card.
Substitution, Belgium. Arthur Theate replaces Romelu Lukaku.
Substitution, IR Iran. Shahriyar Moghanloo replaces Saman Ghoddos.
Substitution, IR Iran. Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh replaces Saeid Ezatolahi.
Substitution, Belgium. Matias Fernandez-Pardo replaces Kevin De Bruyne.
